name: BBQ Ribs, Apple City Championship
recipeIngredient: 3/4 teaspoon MED SIZED ONION FINELY GRATED
1/4 MED SIZE GOLDEN DELICIOUS APPLE GRATED
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX TOGETHER ALL DRY RUB INGREDIENTS.
2. PLACE THE DRY RUB ON BOTH SIDES OF THE RIBS.
3. WRAP THE RIBS IN FOIL AND LET REST FOR 8-10 HOURS AT ROOM TEMPERATURE.
4. COMBINE ALL BBQ SAUCE INGREDIENTS AND BRING TO A BOIL.
5. ADD ONION, APPLE, AND GREEN PEPPER TO THE SAUCE AND SIMMER UNCOVERED UNTIL REACHED DESIRED THICKNESS.
6. SMOTHER RIBS WITH APPLE JUICE DURING COOKING FOR 5 1/2 HOURS AT 180-200 DEGREES F.
7. BASTE THE RIBS WITH SAUCE DURING THE LAST 15 MINUTES OF COOKING.
